items.title: Jupiter: Can JUP’s 14% price rally avoid a liquidity sweep?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jupiter's price rally could impact liquidity dynamics, influencing trading strategies and market depth for Solana.

items.title: Morgan Stanley’s proposed 0.14% ETH and SOL fees could turn the next crypto ETF race into a price fight
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's proposed fees for ETH and SOL may intensify competition among crypto ETFs, affecting investor interest and liquidity in the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Solana dismisses ‘shilling’ narrative: Can SOL/ETH eye an H2 breakout?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's dismissal of the 'shilling' narrative suggests confidence in its fundamentals, potentially positioning SOL for a significant price movement in the second half of the year.
